Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./scripts/data/all-us-dogparks.json'\)\);console.log\('Total parks:',d.length\); const s={}; d.forEach\(p=>{const k=p.state;s[k]=\(s[k]||0\)+1}\); console.log\('States:',Object.keys\(s\).length\); Object.entries\(s\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).slice\(0,10\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ',k,v\)\);")
